title: Electromagnetic Braking System
description: Contactless electromagnetic braking system using eddy-current disc brakes on a test rig, with MOSFET-controlled coil current for variable braking torque modulation.
objective: Demonstrate contactless braking torque proportional to disc speed and coil current; measure torque vs speed curves; zero mechanical wear.
constraints: 12 V coil supply; 200 mm aluminium disc; Arduino Uno controller; bench-top test rig.
supporting_fact_titles: Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) — Wheel Slip Control
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Eddy-Current Electromagnetic Brake: 200 mm aluminium disc; 12 V coil driven via N-MOSFET; MOSFET gate PWM from Arduino.
element_usage_notes.DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control: Drives disc at constant test speeds 100–500 RPM.
